about.title: What is GreenX?
about.description: GreenX is a next-generation agriculture technology platform that connects landowners, field managers, experts, and workers on a single intelligent dashboard. We leverage real-time weather data, soil analytics, crop health monitoring, and drone technology to maximize yields and minimize waste.

features.title: What We Do
features.weather_desc: Live weather forecasts for every farm based on location and pincode.
features.soil_desc: NPK, pH, moisture and organic carbon monitoring for precision farming.
features.drone_desc: Aerial crop monitoring and health assessment using drone technology.
features.task_desc: Assign and track daily farm tasks across your entire workforce.
features.finance_desc: Revenue projections, profit sharing, and expense management.
features.diagnostics_desc: Expert-driven disease and pest risk assessments with prescriptions.

problem.heading: The Structural Crisis in Modern Agriculture

fragmented.title: Fragmented Farmland
fragmented.text: Small disconnected plots reduce scale and efficiency.

labor.title: Labor Shortage
labor.text: Skilled farm labor is harder to find each season.

management.title: Declining Management
management.text: Farms lack daily supervision and planning discipline.

unmanaged.title: Unmanaged Land
unmanaged.text: Many owners cannot operate land full-time from cities.

solution.heading: The GreenX Cluster Farming Model
solution.tagline: Connected farms. Scientific decisions. Professional operations. Transparent outcomes.

aggregation.title: Land Aggregation
aggregation.text: Connected farm clusters managed as one operational unit.

soil.title: Scientific Soil Diagnosis
soil.text: NPK, pH, moisture, and lab-backed crop planning.

management.title: Expert Farm Management
management.text: Field managers run labor, operations, and execution.

monitoring.title: Digital Monitoring
monitoring.text: Live updates, dashboards, photos, and milestone tracking.

transparency.heading: Operational Transparency
transparency.tagline: The GreenX intelligence engine turns daily field noise into decision-grade insights that landowners can trust.

live.label: Live Updates
live.headline: Live Farm Feed
live.subline: Every field event becomes an instant signal.

crop.label: Crop Status
crop.headline: Growth Intelligence
crop.subline: Crop health patterns predicted before stress appears.

input.label: Input Audit
input.headline: Input Transparency
input.subline: Spend, usage, and waste mapped with precision.

profit.label: Profit View
profit.headline: Profit Forecast
profit.subline: Revenue confidence in motion, not after harvest.

vision.heading: Vision
vision.description: GreenX aims to become the operating system for professionally managed agriculture.
vision.subline: Technology + agronomy + operations in one platform.

landowner.title: Landowner Dashboard
landowner.text: Profit, costs, crop plans, and farm timelines.

manager.title: Field Manager Operations
manager.text: Task assignment, attendance, and daily execution.

monitoring.title: Farm Monitoring System
monitoring.text: Drone observations and field-level status visibility.

inventory.title: Inventory and Labor Management
inventory.text: Inputs, usage, worker coordination, and alerts.

login_page.title: Login to GreenX
login_page.contact_admin: Contact your administrator to get your login credentials.
